creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun Apr  6 05:49:53 2014
New Revision: 350333
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/350333
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r350333/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, fix WWW and update pkg-descr
  
  PR:		188273
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-Catalyst-Plugin-Session-Store-Delegate/Makefile
  head/www/p5-Catalyst-Plugin-Session-Store-Delegate/pkg-descr

Modified: head/www/p5-Catalyst-Plugin-Session-Store-Delegate/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-Catalyst-Plugin-Session-Store-Delegate/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:49:47 2014	(r350332)
+++ head/www/p5-Catalyst-Plugin-Session-Store-Delegate/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:49:53 2014	(r350333)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Delegate session storage to an application model object
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Catalyst-Plugin-Session>=0.27:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Catalyst-Plugin-Session \
 		p5-MRO-Compat>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-MRO-Compat
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}

Modified: head/www/p5-Catalyst-Plugin-Session-Store-Delegate/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-Catalyst-Plugin-Session-Store-Delegate/pkg-descr	Sun Apr  6 05:49:47 2014	(r350332)
+++ head/www/p5-Catalyst-Plugin-Session-Store-Delegate/pkg-descr	Sun Apr  6 05:49:53 2014	(r350333)
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
-This storage module will store session data in a database using DBIx::Class.
+This store plugins makes delegating session storage to a first class object
+model easy.
 
-WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Catalyst-Plugin-Session-Store-DBIC/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Catalyst-Plugin-Session-Store-Delegate/
